title: Hemipilia tominagae
taxonomy: Hemipilia tominagae is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification places it within the larger group of flowering plants. The genus Hemipilia is a small group of orchids, and Hemipilia tominagae is a specific species within this group. Further classification includes it as a member of the subtribe Orchidinae, which is a subunit within the orchid family. It also belongs to the tribe Orchideae, which is a larger division within the Orchidaceae family.
